legal.title: 使用条款和免责声明
legal.noteFooter: 在您接受之前，无法开始下载。
legal.summary:
要使用此扩展，您必须接受以下条款：

- 该扩展仅供合法使用。
- 您只能下载您有权下载的内容。
- 遵守版权、许可、平台规则和当地法律完全是您的责任。
- 非法使用以及任何法律或财务后果均由您承担。
- 扩展按“原样”提供；不保证不间断运行或适用于特定用途。
- 开发商不对数据丢失、帐户限制、版权索赔、收入损失或其他损害承担责任。
- 如果您发送启用了 cookie 的可选错误报告，则 cookie 名称/值可能会通过 HTTPS 发送；您触发报告并可以在设置中关闭 cookie。

打开下面的完整条款和隐私按钮以了解详细信息。
update.title: 可用更新
update.downloadTitleMissing: 更新消息文件中没有下载 URL。
popup.blockedSiteNotice: 抱歉，我们的扩展程序无法在此网站上使用。感谢您的理解。
media.clearHint: 如果您清除了列表，请切换播放器或重播以刷新捕获。
media.externalNote: 粘贴 HLS 主播放列表或子播放列表；质量选择在页面内打开。
media.dmNote: 活动和已完成的工作集中在一处。
settings.devHint: 显示源 URL 和高级选项。
settings.forceHuntHint: 启用后，页面上会进行大量 DOM + 影子搜索；关闭时，光扫描。每次切换都会重新加载此选项卡。
settings.langHint: 更改后重新加载弹出窗口和活动选项卡。
settings.debugNote: 记录下载问题的日志；可以导出日志文件。
settings.schemaProfile: 架构配置文件（正在开发中）
settings.notifNote: When a job completes, the chosen sound plays at this level.
settings.bugCookiesHint: Some issues are harder to diagnose when off
settings.bugNote: When off, no cookie list is sent. Report server and auth are embedded in the extension.
bug.title: Report issue
bug.descPlaceholder: What happened, what did you expect?
bug.emailHint: If you want a reply, enter your email. Optional; if empty the report has no address.
alert.legalRequiredDownload: You must accept the terms of use to download.
alert.legalCheckboxes: Check both Terms and Privacy boxes to continue.
alert.updateNoUrl: No download link in the message file.
alert.notifBuiltinDelete: Built-in sounds cannot be removed. Only your added sounds can be removed.
alert.filePickerUnsupported: File picking is not supported in this browser.
alert.soundTooLarge: Sound file too large. Pick a short notification under 512KB.
alert.needPlaylistUrl: Please paste a master or playlist URL.
alert.httpOnly: Only http and https links are supported.
alert.contentScriptUnreachable: Could not reach the page. Make sure the extension runs on this site or refresh the page.
alert.siteAlreadyListed: This site is already on the list.
alert.previewFail: Preview failed: refresh the page and try again.
alert.forcedBlockRemove: is on the mandatory block list and cannot be removed.
media.placeholderCleared: List cleared. Change or replay the player on the page to capture again.
content.legalRequired: You must accept the terms of use to download.
content.listParseFailTitle: Video list could not be parsed
content.clipDenied: Clipboard denied. Select and copy the text manually.
content.clipBlocked: Clipboard API blocked. Select and copy the text manually.
content.rangeInvalidPreview: Select a valid range for preview.
content.listUnreadableIntro: This page's video list could not be read.
content.listUnreadableHint: Below is the first part returned by the server. You can forward it to the developer.
content.audioIconSeparate: No audio in this quality — download audio from the dubbing section
content.playlistPreviewTitle: Preview this HLS playlist — check audio / subtitle language
content.folderNotSelected: Download could not start: no save location was chosen.
dm.headerSub: Your download queue stays here even when tabs close.
dm.bgThrottleHint: When this window stays in the background, Chrome may throttle download speed. Keep the Download Manager tab in the foreground, pin it, or move the window to another screen for full speed.
dm.fixedDirCheckbox: Auto-save to the same folder (this session)
dm.runAllTitle: Download everything in the queue in order
dm.emptyCompletedSearch: No completed downloads match your search.
dm.emptyPendingSearch: No queued/active downloads match your search.
dm.emptyPendingHtml:
No pending downloads yet.
Start from a video or the dubbing menu using the extension download action.
dm.jsonDropHint: Drop a .json file anywhere in this window (schema profile: extension popup)
dm.finalizingHint: Segments finished; closing file (can take a long time on very large files).
dm.alertDeleteActiveWait: Please wait for a running or finalizing download to finish, or cancel it, before deleting.
dm.alertFinalizingWait: Segments downloaded; the file is being written and closed. Cancelling now may corrupt the file. Please wait.
dm.alertOfflineTryLater: No internet connection. You can try again when you are back online.
dm.alertNoRedownload: No re-download data found for this entry.
dm.alertOtherJobActive: Another download is already running. Finish or cancel it first.
dm.alertFolderUnsupported: This browser does not support folder picking. The normal save dialog will be used.
dm.alertFolderDenied: Write permission was not granted for this folder. Auto-save has been turned off.
dm.fixedDirNoteHtml: Selected folder: {name} (MP4 files still go to the browser Downloads folder)
dm.confirmClearPending: Delete all queued/active downloads? The active download will be cancelled.
dm.alertNoQueued: There are no queued jobs waiting to download.
dm.alertOfflinePaused: Internet disconnected. The download was paused automatically.
dm.qualityListExpired: Could not fetch the playlist for this quality. The link may have expired—you may need to reopen the page.
dm.audioListExpired: Could not fetch the audio playlist. The link may have expired.
dm.segmentRangeNone: No segments remain in the range from this segment index.
dm.jobErrorFm4Only: This quality uses fMP4 (EXT-X-MAP). MP4 merge/transmux was disabled, so this quality cannot be downloaded. Please pick a TS quality.
dm.jobErrorSegmentRetry: Segment download failed. Check your connection and press Resume to retry.
dm.finalizeTimeoutDetail: Closing the file took too long or stalled (very large file). Check the file name and size in your file manager; the extension should be .ts.
dm.updatePrompt: An update is available. Please update the extension.
dm.rangeHelpFm4: This stream is already fMP4 (EXT-X-MAP). It will be merged as MP4.
dm.rangeHelpTsTransmux: TS segments are converted to MP4 while downloading and written to disk. RAM use is limited with a bounded buffer.
dm.rangeResumeLabel: On disconnect / re-download, resume from this segment
dm.rangeResumeNote: Note: this starts a new file from that segment (earlier segments are not prepended).
pv.hlsNotSupported: HLS preview is not supported in this environment.
pv.vttMetaWebvttNo: WEBVTT header: absent / may be another format
jmi.subtitle: Subtitle
jmi.errNoVariantInMaster: 在主播放列表中找不到质量
jmi.errChildPlaylist: 无法获取质量播放列表
jmi.alertNoSchema: 没有保存的格式架构。首先在扩展弹出窗口中选择一个配置文件 JSON。
jmi.alertNoSchemaPick: 没有保存的格式架构。首先在扩展弹出窗口中选择一个配置文件。
dm.errSavePickerContext: 此上下文中不支持保存对话框 API。
dm.errSegmentBinary: 无法识别段二进制格式（需要使用 base64）。
dm.errBufferNotReady: MP4 传输复用缓冲区未准备好（缺少映射）。
